ratings.comment: Best professor at UW-Madison. I'm not even a design studies major (engineering major).

Class was interesting and not difficult at all. Only 5 tests throughout the semester that you'd easily pass if you showed up to class. Prof. Dennis is a super nice guy and makes it obvious in the way he lectures that he really cares about landscape architecture and really just wants you to do well in the class.

Very nice guy. 75% of grade is 5 tests and the rest of your grade is super easy in-class stuff. No outside of class work. Just memorized the text on his slides the day before tests and this will be and easy A
